atom_origin_policy: Verify original roles only for pure explicit D/A rows; preserve unknown/empty-donor rows as unverifiable rather than relabeling.

marker_rule.attachment_anchor_rule: first RDKit neighbor of the dummy atom; equivalently the marker-preceding neighbor in frozen source serialization
marker_rule.clean_component_rule: remove the literal [A] marker before RDKit parsing
marker_rule.substitution_rule: remove one explicit hydrogen from each anchor when present, then add one single bond
